Left-click to open AtlasLoot.\\nMiddle-c: Left-click to open AtlasLoot.\nMiddle-click for AtlasLoot options.\nRight-click and drag to move this button.
New feature in 4.02.01: Type '/atlasloot: New feature in 4.02.01: Type '/atlasloot options' to bring up the options menu and '/atlasloot reset' to reset AtlasLoot after a disconnect.
New feature in 4.03.00: Introducing the: New feature in 4.03.00: Introducing the Wishlist!  Simply alt-click on any item to add it to the wishlist.  To delete an item from the wishlist, open up your wishlist and alt-click the item to remove it.  It's that simple.  Buttons to view the wishlist have been added to the Atlas interface and the loot browser.
New feature in 4.05.00: Advanced searchi: New feature in 4.05.00: Advanced searching functionality is now available. You can type in a partial item name, for example typing 'elixir' gives all items in the database with 'elixir' in the name.  Big thanks to Kurax for his help.
New feature in 4.05.00: All professions: New feature in 4.05.00: All professions are now included in the AtlasLoot_Crafting module.

A Small Seaforium charge which is enough: A Small Seaforium charge which is enough to blast open some doors.
Allows opening of hard locks. The skele: Allows opening of hard locks.  The skeleton key is consumed in the process.
Allows the miner to smelt a chunk of cop: Allows the miner to smelt a chunk of copper ore into a copper bar.  Smelting copper requires a forge.
Allows the miner to smelt a chunk of gol: Allows the miner to smelt a chunk of gold ore into a gold bar.  Smelting gold requires a forge.
Allows the miner to smelt a chunk of iro: Allows the miner to smelt a chunk of iron ore and a lump of coal together into a steel bar.  Smelting steel requires a forge.
Allows the miner to smelt a chunk of iron ore into an iron bar.  Smelting iron requires a forge.
Allows the miner to smelt a chunk of mit: Allows the miner to smelt a chunk of mithril ore into a mithril bar.  Smelting mithril requires a forge.
Allows the miner to smelt a chunk of sil: Allows the miner to smelt a chunk of silver ore into a silver bar.  Smelting silver requires a forge.
Allows the miner to smelt a chunk of tho: Allows the miner to smelt a chunk of thorium ore into a thorium bar.  Smelting thorium requires a forge.
Allows the miner to smelt a chunk of tin: Allows the miner to smelt a chunk of tin ore into a tin bar.  Smelting tin requires a forge.
Allows the miner to smelt a chunk of tru: Allows the miner to smelt a chunk of truesilver ore into a truesilver bar.  Smelting truesilver requires a forge.
Allows the miner to smelt a dreamsteel b: Allows the miner to smelt a dreamsteel bar. Smelting dreamsteel requires a forge.
Allows the miner to smelt a tin bar and: Allows the miner to smelt a tin bar and a copper bar together into two bronze bars.  Smelting bronze requires a forge.
Allows the miner to smelt chunks of dark: Allows the miner to smelt chunks of dark iron ore into a dark iron bar.  Smelting Dark Iron can only be done at the Black Forge in Blackrock Depths.

Builds a campfire that increases the spi: Builds a campfire that increases the spirits of those nearby by 4 and allows cooking.

Create the reagent for the Blind ability: Create the reagent for the Blind ability.
Creates a Vial of Powerful Anti-Venom.
Creates two Iron Buckles that are used b: Creates two Iron Buckles that are used by other trade skills.
Permanently increase the intellect by 8: Permanently increase the intellect by 8 and spell power by 6 of an item worn on the chest, legs, hands or feet.  Only usable on items level 60 and above.
Purifies Essence of Undeath turning it i: Purifies Essence of Undeath turning it into Water.
Sets up a fishing boat. While on your bo: Sets up a fishing boat. While on your boat you gain +50 fishing skill. Can only be used outdoors near a deep enough body of water.
Sets up a simple wooden planter. Planter: Sets up a simple wooden planter. Planters allow you to plant seeds and cultivate crops.
Sets up a traveler's tent. While under t: Sets up a traveler's tent. While under the cover of the tent you are resting and may gain rested experience. Can only be used outdoors.
Taints Essence of Water turning it into: Taints Essence of Water turning it into Undeath.
The purification of tainted Felcloth int: The purification of tainted Felcloth into Mooncloth can only be done at a moonwell, and only ocassionally will the waters permit themselves to be used in such a way.
Transmutes a Globe of Water into three E: Transmutes a Globe of Water into three Elemental Water.
Transmutes a Heart of Fire into three El: Transmutes a Heart of Fire into three Elemental Earth.
Transmutes a Heart of Fire into three Elemental Fires.
Turns a bar of Iron into a bar of Gold.
Turns a bar of Mithril into a bar of Tru: Turns a bar of Mithril into a bar of Truesilver.
Turns a bar of Thorium and an Arcane Cry: Turns a bar of Thorium and an Arcane Crystal into Arcanite.
With Swiftthistle for speed and crushed: With  Swiftthistle for speed and crushed Silverleaf for enhancement, a potion to to enchance ones natural agility is brewed.
With the mixture of Snakeroot for physic: With the mixture of Snakeroot for physical improvement and crushed Silverleaf for enhancement, a potion to to bring out one's inner lion is brewed.
